---
title: "attachObserveSink()"
description: "Attach adapter-owned storage to `Graph.observe()` read-only egress (D57/D74/D125). Writes are serialized in observe order; lifecycle barriers drain the queue without mutating graph topology."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Attach adapter-owned storage to `Graph.observe()` read-only egress (D57/D74/D125). Writes are
serialized in observe order; lifecycle barriers drain the queue without mutating graph topology.

## Import

```ts
import { attachObserveSink } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/observe-storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function attachObserveSink(
	graph: Graph,
	sink: ObserveSink<T>,
	opts: AttachObserveSinkOptions<T> = {},
): ObserveSinkHandle
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `sink` | `ObserveSink<T>` | sink value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `AttachObserveSinkOptions<T>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `ObserveSinkHandle` value.

## Example

```ts
import { attachObserveSink } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/observe-storage";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/observe-storage.ts`
